plugin.name: Mijia Smart Home
plugin.description: Control Xiaomi/Mijia smart devices and let your AI companion handle the lights, AC, and more
panel.subtitle: Manage Mijia smart devices, let AI help you control your home.
panel.login.title: Mijia Account Login
panel.login.description: Scan QR code with Mijia app, or complete authorization in browser.
panel.login.scanHint: Please scan QR code with Mijia app
panel.login.qrGenerated: QR code generated, please scan to login
panel.control.title: Smart Control
panel.control.description: Control devices with natural language, supports device names and aliases.
panel.control.help: Example: turn on plug, turn off bedroom light, turn on AC
panel.control.placeholder: Enter command, e.g.: turn on living room light
actions.smartControl.label: Smart Control
panel.devices.title: Device List
panel.devices.columns.name: Device Name
panel.devices.empty.title: No Devices
panel.devices.empty.description: Login and refresh device list to view.
panel.scenes.title: Smart Scenes
panel.scenes.empty.title: No Scenes
panel.scenes.empty.description: Create smart scenes in Mijia app.
actions.login.label: QR Login
actions.logout.label: Logout
actions.refreshDevices.label: Refresh Devices
actions.executeScene.label: Execute Scene
entries.start_qrcode_login.name: Start QR Login
entries.start_qrcode_login.description: Get QR code image and start login flow
entries.logout.name: Logout
entries.logout.description: Clear saved credentials and local data
entries.list_devices.name: List Devices
entries.list_devices.description: Get device list with caching support
entries.execute_scene.name: Execute Scene
entries.execute_scene.description: Trigger a preset smart scene in Mijia app
entries.smart_control.name: Smart Control
entries.open_ui.name: Open Config Page
entries.open_ui.description: Open the Mijia plugin Web UI configuration page in the browser
entries.reload_credential.name: Reload Credential
entries.reload_credential.description: Reload Mijia credentials from file and reinitialize API to ensure login state is up-to-date
entries.check_login_status.name: Check Login Status
entries.check_login_status.description: Poll to check whether QR code login was successful
entries.list_homes.name: List Homes
entries.list_homes.description: List all Mijia homes under the current account with their IDs
entries.get_cached_devices.name: Get Cached Devices
entries.get_cached_devices.description: Read device list from local cache, auto-fetch if cache doesn't exist
entries.list_scenes.name: List Smart Scenes
entries.list_scenes.description: List all Mijia smart scenes under the current account with caching support
entries.set_device_alias.name: Set Device Alias
entries.set_device_alias.description: Set a custom alias for a device to make it easier to control by name
entries.get_device_aliases.name: Get Device Aliases
entries.get_device_aliases.description: Return the alias mapping (did -> alias) for all devices
entries.query_device_state.name: Query Device State
entries.query_device_state.description: Query all readable properties of a device by name, supporting aliases and room+device name
quickstart.title: Mijia Smart Home Quickstart
quickstart.subtitle: Set up Mijia smart home control in a few steps.
quickstart.steps.login.title: 1. Login to Mijia
quickstart.steps.login.body: Click QR login, scan the QR code with Mijia app to authorize.
quickstart.steps.devices.title: 2. Get Device List
quickstart.steps.devices.body: After login, click refresh devices to see all Mijia devices.
quickstart.steps.control.title: 3. Control Devices
quickstart.steps.control.body: Enter commands in the smart control area, like 'turn on living room light'.
quickstart.steps.scene.title: 4. Execute Scenes
quickstart.steps.scene.body: Click execute button in scene list to trigger preset smart scenes.
quickstart.tips.title: Tips
quickstart.tips.0: Supports natural language control like 'turn on light', 'turn off AC', 'turn on bedroom plug'.
quickstart.tips.1: Devices support custom aliases for voice control.
quickstart.tips.2: You can say 'help me turn on the living room light' to control devices.
